text: Here are the next steps. Freeze scope. Rerun QA. Ship the build. After that, we need approval.

• Freeze scope.
• Rerun QA.
• Ship the build.

After that, we need approval.

Here are the next steps:
• Freeze scope.
• Ship the build.

The priorities are clear:
• Reliability.
• Speed.
• Simplicity.

The rollout stays tomorrow.
